summary.intent: Address a second round of Codex automated review findings on PR #673 (fogodev/ars-ui) related to Tour component lifecycle bugs, then get the PR to a clean approved state.
summary.outcome: All 5 second-pass Codex threads were fixed (stale z-index feedback, focus suppression for wait steps, prop-driven step change focus, prop sync narrowing, controlled-open async loading). Tests passed and a fix commit was created, though the co-author trailer was not yet added to earlier commits at transcript end.

repo: Tour component state machine lives in crates/ars-components/src/overlay/tour/mod.rs
Codex reviews are triggered via `@codex review` PR comment and tracked via emoji reactions (👀 = reviewing, 👍 = approved) plus unresolved thread count
The repo uses cargo llvm-cov for coverage, cargo proptest for property-based tests, and cargo +nightly fmt for formatting
Proptest state machine invariants are tagged with `--ignored` and must be explicitly run
CI pipeline includes: formatting, snapshot checks, workspace check, clippy, mutual-exclusion, and unit tests — in roughly that order

code.finding: Second-pass fixes target transition guards/effects around stale adapter feedback and dynamic-prop transitions in this range
Area inspected for prop sync narrowing — actual step change detection vs. full prop sync
Area inspected for controlled-open async loading behavior preservation

workflow: Codex second passes can take significantly longer than first passes; polling every 2 minutes is the established cadence
The pattern of writing failing tests before patching is consistently followed to validate fixes
Inline replies + thread resolution + triggering next Codex pass is the standard loop for addressing automated review findings
Co-author trailers should be added at commit time; retrofitting them onto already-pushed commits requires history rewrite + force-push-with-lease

friction: The second Codex review pass took much longer than expected, requiring many polling cycles before completing
The co-author trailer was not added to the commit at the end of the transcript despite the user explicitly requesting it mid-session — the commit message only included Codex as co-author, not Claude
Formatting check failed on first attempt and required a separate `cargo +nightly fmt --all` pass before re-running verification
open_items: Earlier commits (first two) on the PR branch still need the Claude co-author trailer added via history rewrite + force-push-with-lease
The fix commit itself may need the Claude co-author trailer added — the transcript ends before this is confirmed
Push of the second-pass fix commit to the remote branch is not shown as completed in the transcript
A third Codex review pass has not yet been triggered after the second-pass fixes
